calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-25-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day for name change.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Sara Lerschen

Petitioner: Kristy Ann Kosach, in pro, was sworn and examined
The Court grants the petition for change of to: Kristy Ann Wellen
Decree signed in open court.
